query:
-- Look for any remaining combined-name entries (names with "and" or "&")
SELECT id, authorName, enrichedAt, avatarUrl IS NOT NULL as has_avatar
FROM author_profiles
WHERE authorName LIKE '% and %' 
   OR authorName LIKE '% & %'
   OR authorName LIKE '%/%'
ORDER BY authorName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute

SELECT id, authorName, enrichedAt, avatarUrl IS NOT NULL as has_avatar
FROM author_profiles

   OR authorName LIKE '% & %'
   OR authorName LIKE '%/%'
ORDER BY authorName;
